title: 10 best herbal tinctures for altitude sickness
description: Turmeric tinctures helps with altitude sickness because of its potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. At high elevations, the body experiences oxidative stress and inflammation due to decreased oxygen levels and increased exercise intensity. Turmeric's active compound curcumin has been shown to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function, alleviating symptoms such as headache, nausea, and fatigue associated with altitude sickness.
